list.name: Enrico Bertocchi
list.msg: Thank you so much for creating and maintaining FlyEnv, this project has solved a lot of problems for me, I'm just sorry that at the moment I can only donate $12, I hope in the future to have the opportunity to provide you with monthly support because you deserve it

list.name: Max Voitsekhovsky
list.msg: You've come a long way from a small project for managing PHP / MYSQL / NGINX to a super useful tool for engineers! Thank you very much!

list.name: BarkahIstigozah
list.msg: Keep up the great work on your app, dude!

list.name: Alexander Alexandrov
list.msg: For a great app!

list.name: Fadlur.id
list.msg: Semoga Semakin Bermanfaat Untuk Banyak Orang

list.name: Ainars
list.msg: So satisfied by this, I now want to set this up on other devices aswell!

list.name: imadtbro
list.msg: beats any other local server environment. so easy to use and get anything i need up and running

list.name: Dennys Oliveira
list.msg: Amazing environment manager!! Super recommended

list.name: Ainars
list.msg: Looks like a very nice, easy to use tool! Well done! Can't wait to try and use this across many projects with different tech stacks!

list.name: Al
list.msg: FlyEnv best dev environment so far for spinning up my WordPress Dev sites! It is fast!

list.name: satriyo
list.msg: you make my life easier, thanks!

list.name: Colir
list.msg: Amazing tool, blazing fast and so well integrated into the macOS environment. Well done!

list.name: Mário C.
list.msg:
Thank you for your work.
I had some troubles getting it to work properly on linux (Apache, PHP and MariaDB) but the idea is great and I look forward to future improvements.

list.name: Rey Arlena
list.msg: An excellent tool for development on Linux, certainly one of the best options. Thanks so much for your all the hard work!

list.name: levan144
list.msg: good tools , thanks from georgia

list.name: Edardo Mannucci
list.msg: You are doing a great job, you are speeding up the local development of all of us.

list.name: StanB
list.msg: work with your app on macOS, very useful

list.name: Carlo
list.msg: Using this program every day, thanks!

list.name: wgnd.93
list.msg: Gracias por esta herramienta open-source increíble. Rápida, nativa y simplifica mi trabajo. ¡Un placer apoyar el proyecto!

list.name: Chris Ohps
list.msg: Small dev outfit here really transformed by your work

list.name: Leon
list.msg: Grazie per il software.

list.name: FeelsGoodMan Clap
list.msg: Third donation. Love the project

list.name: Artur
list.msg: Thanks for building the app and keeping it improving!

list.name: Chris
list.msg: Thanks for this great tool

list.name: BilkOrama
list.msg: Thanks for this cool project. As a small thank you for your time and expertise, here's a coffee voucher :-) Greetings from Düsseldorf

list.name: vhung234
list.msg: Works well on Linux; tested with pikaOS and cachyOS. On cachyOS, the $PATH needs to be set manually. Hopefully cachyOS will receive official support.

list.name: fcanteiro
list.msg: buying my second license, keep up the good work

list.name: Richard
list.msg: I just switched to Linux and found this. Thanks a lot, this looks great!

list.name: aldhinya
list.msg: Thank you, the application is very helpful

list.name: nereg
list.msg: Finally a fully-fledged development solution for us Linux users! I was looking for something similar to Laragon or Herd on Windows and found FlyEnv. Just what the doctor ordered! Thank you for the awesome software!

list.name: datiller
list.msg: loved it so much on windows, installing on ubuntu daily driver

list.name: David
list.msg: Thanks for this great alternative to LocalWP

list.msg:
Eu amei a sua iniciativa e o seu software. Finalmente uma ferramenta descente e prática para trabalhar com desenvolvimento web.

Muito obrigado pelo seu trabalho e esforço. Continue assim.

list.name: ahmads
list.msg: This application is very helpful for local development

list.name: burnee77
list.msg: Flyenv rocks

list.name: Admire Mhlaba
list.msg: This is by far the best xampp or Ampps alternative on the planet, easy to install, configure, and use. The UI is elegant and expressive. I am very impressed with how well supported and loved this open-source software has become.

list.name: JP
list.msg: Great product! It deserves more credit that it gets compared to similar products like xampp. Way easier, way more stable, way more flexible.

list.name: Ahmet Erduğan
list.msg:
Dear Team,

I am very pleased with the open-source project you have developed. I’m making this donation to support your work and help you take the project to even greater levels.

Thank you for your efforts and contributions to the community.

list.name: JoeyRedShirt
list.msg: This is such an amazing tool. Easy to use, and the UI is miles ahead of any of the alternatives. Keep up the awesome work!

list.name: V01d570rm
list.msg: Very good development software, ATM best alternative to LAMP, XAMP, Laragon(!), reliable, predictable, configurable... Big praise.
